subcodes.first_line: This is the Day of Victory! Arise to aid the Cause of thy Lord, the Most High, the Most Great. Say: O servants of the All-Merciful! The sun hath risen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم النصر قم علی نصره امر ربک العلی العظیم قل یا عباد الرحمن قد اشرقت شمس
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
